hero.title: Ai Engineer - Full-stack developer
hero.tagline: // AI Engineer - Full-stack Developer — Yerevan, Armenia
hero.description: One full-stack developer who handles everything — from design to deployment. Direct communication, honest pricing, and results that speak louder than promises.

services.label: // what i build
services.title: Three Ways I Can Help
services.description: Most projects combine two or more of these. I work with agencies and businesses.

items.title: Figma → Production
items.description: I build your designs into fast, responsive websites with pixel-accurate implementation. Clean code your team can maintain. White-label available for agencies — your client never needs to know.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.description: Connect your CRM, forms, email, and internal systems. Eliminate the repetitive manual tasks draining your team's time. No-code where it fits, custom code where it doesn't.

items.title: AI Features That Actually Ship
items.description: I have an AI degree backing every integration I build — chatbots, content generation, lead qualification, document processing. Real implementations, not copy-pasted tutorials.

process.label: // how we work
process.title: Clear Process. Zero Surprises.
process.description: Whether you're an agency subcontracting or a business starting a project.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: Let's understand your needs, timeline, and constraints. Discuss your project requirements and budget. Assessment of fit and scope.

steps.title: Proposal & Contract
steps.description: Written proposal: fixed scope, fixed price, fixed deadline. No range estimates. You know the cost before a line is written. Agencies: white-label + NDA available.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Weekly check-ins. Working code deployed to staging every sprint. Direct access to me — no project manager between us.

steps.title: Handoff & Support
steps.description: Deployed to production. Full documentation. 30-day post-launch support included. You own everything: code, repo, domain, accounts.

about.label: about
about.title: One Developer. Full Ownership.
about.description1: I'm Sepehr — a full-stack developer based in Yerevan, Armenia, with a Bachelor's degree in Artificial Intelligence (ML + NLP focus). I build production websites and internal tools for agencies and businesses worldwide.
about.description2: I work solo by design. It means you deal directly with the person writing your code. No account managers, no handoff to juniors, no communication overhead. What we agree on is what gets built.
about.description3: My AI degree isn't a talking point — it's the reason my integrations work properly instead of just barely working.
focus: Full-stack implementation from Figma or spec
Practical AI integration backed by genuine ML understanding
Multi-language deployment: EN, HY, RU, FA, DE, FR

contact.label: let's talk
contact.title: Ready to Build Something?
contact.description: Whether you're an agency looking for a reliable subcontractor or a company that needs a better product — I respond to every message within 24 hours.
contact.personalNote: I check messages personally — not a bot, not a VA.

form.name: Your name
form.projectPlaceholder: What are you building? What's the challenge? What's the deadline?

success.title: Got it.
success.description: I'll review your brief and respond within 24 hours. If it sounds like a good fit, I'll suggest a time for a quick call.

process.step1: I review your brief and reply within 24 hours via email or WhatsApp.
process.step2: If it's a good fit, we discuss details over email, WhatsApp or call.
process.step3: You receive a written, fixed-price proposal in less than 3 days.

items.title: Ariana Global Trade — B2B Export Portal
items.description: A premium B2B showcase for an agricultural commodities exporter targeting international wholesale importers. Built with genuine engineering depth: multi-language support including full Persian RTL layout switching, a dynamic volume-based pricing calculator, and an OpenAI-powered pre-qualification chatbot that routes leads automatically.
highlights: RTL/LTR layout switching under 180ms (EN · FA · HY)
AI chat concierge with OpenAI API + graceful fallback handling
Volume-tier pricing calculator running entirely client-side
Responsive across 5 viewport breakpoints with sub-180ms page load

items.title: FORMA Studio — Art Direction & Advertising
items.description: A premium showcase website for FORMA, an avant-garde art direction and advertising studio — built to demonstrate advanced frontend engineering. The centrepiece is a real-time Three.js WebGL scene in the hero that pauses GPU rendering via IntersectionObserver when off-screen, maintaining 60fps across all device tiers. The site is fully multilingual across four scripts — including dynamic Persian RTL — built entirely in CSS Modules.
highlights: Three.js WebGL 3D hero with IntersectionObserver render-pausing — zero GPU/CPU usage when scrolled out of view
Full RTL/LTR layout engine for EN · RU · FA · HY via i18next with mirrored grid, alignment, and absolute positioning
Zero-Tailwind CSS Modules architecture — fully scoped styles with no global override risk across every component

screenshots.alt: FORMA hero with Three.js WebGL scene

multilingual.label: multilingual delivery
multilingual.title: Production sites shipped in 5+ languages.
multilingual.description: SEO-optimised per market. Full localisation — copy, currency, legal. Including complex right-to-left (RTL) layout engines with sub-180ms page-load transitions.
